markdown.gemini:
# Al-Azhar Park (حديقة الأزهر)
**Status:** PUBLISHED_MEDIA  
**District:** Al-Darb al-Ahmar  
**Type:** Urban Park / Landscape Heritage  

## Historical Summary
Gifted to Cairo by the Aga Khan Trust for Culture (AKTC) and opened in 2005. The park construction led to major archaeological excavations along the adjacent 12th-century Ayyubid city wall.

*أنشئت بتمويل من أغاخان للثقافة وافتتحت عام 2005. كشف مشروع الحديقة عن أجزاء واسعة من السور الأيوبي التاريخي.*

## Architectural Details
Contemporary landscape design inspired by traditional Islamic gardens, featuring geometric water channels, native flora, and terraced viewpoints overlooking Islamic Cairo.

### Key Elements
- Water Channels
- Terraced Viewpoints
- Ayyubid Wall Integration

## Stories & Heritage Significance
### Urban Transformation (التحول الحضري)
**Classification:** fact
Transformed a 500-year-old rubbish dump into a major green lung and heritage axis for Cairo.

## Visitor Information
- **Opening Hours:** 09:00 - 23:00
- **Ticket Price:** Ticketed entry fee applies at turnstiles
- **Photography Rules:** Casual personal photography permitted
- **Dress Code:** Standard casual attire
- **Accessibility:** Wheelchair accessible paths and electric cart services available

## Photo Candidates
- **[COVER]** Al-Azhar Park Panoramic View (CC BY-SA 3.0)
  - Direct Link: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/5a/Al-Azhar_Park_Panorama.jpg
  - Attribution: CC BY-SA 3.0 via Wikimedia Commons

## Sources
- **[SRC-AKTC-AZHARPARK]** [Aga Khan Historic Cities Programme - Al-Azhar Park](https://www.akdn.org/our-agencies/aga-khan-trust-culture/cairo-projects) - *Aga Khan Development Network*
- **[SRC-MTA-AZHARPARK]** [Egypt Tourism Portal - Al Azhar Park](https://egymonuments.gov.eg/en/attractions/al-azhar-park) - *Ministry of Tourism and Antiquities*

## Unresolved Items
No open issues.
